caption: A screen recording shows a web browser with multiple open tabs, including one for "Kumu" and another for "blackboard". The main window displays a digital mind map or concept map featuring circular nodes connected by lines. One prominent node contains a black-and-white illustration of two people talking, with a text box next to it containing the words "CLUB DEPTH-NG" and "WHY YOU define just? why you define just? why you define just? why you define just?". Small circular profile pictures of participants appear as nodes, such as one labeled "Karan Bedi". A video call overlay in the top right corner shows a man with a headset and a dark shirt against a plain background. As the sequence progresses, the browser window remains static while the man in the video call speaks, shifting his facial expressions and slightly moving his head.
